pages.text: Death itself, straight from the other realm.

pages.title: Summoning Death
pages.description: Death can be summoned while trying to bind with $(l:circle_magic/binding/fetish)Rite of Binding$(/l) too many spectral beings at once. If there are at least 5 $(l:creatures/poltergeist)Poltergeist$(/l), 5 $(l:creatures/spectre)Spectres$(/l) and 5 $(l:creatures/banshee)Banshees$(/l) nearby, the $(l:conjuration/fetish)Fetish$(/l) is destroyed and $(item)Death$() itself will be summoned.
pages._comment: Unlocked when the player summons Death

pages.title: Impersonating Death
pages.description: If a player is wearing all of Death's outfit and wields a $(l:artifacts/misc)Hand of Death$(/l), that player will became Death itself, thus being summoned during such rite.$(br)Wearing the full set also caps all incoming damage to 7 points.
pages._comment: Unlocked when a player is summoned in place of Death
